select bdg_year AS flc_id,  
bdg_year AS flc_name  
FROM fims_usr.budget
GROUP BY bdg_year

SELECT DISTINCT oun_level FLC_ID, oun_level FLC_NAME
FROM fims_usr.organization_unit where oun_level in (3,4);

SELECT DISTINCT 
  SB.oun_code AS flc_id,
  concat_ws(' - ', SB.oun_code, oun_desc) AS flc_name
FROM fims_usr.structure_budget AS SB, fims_usr.organization_unit AS OU
	Where SB.oun_code = OU.oun_code
ORDER BY SB.oun_code;

    $paramBdgCommitment[] = $_POST['id'];
    $paramBdgCommitment[] = $_POST['year'];

    // var_dump($_POST); die;
    $budgetID = "CONCAT_WS('-', sb.fty_fund_type, sb.at_activity_code,sb.oun_code, sb.ccr_costcentre, sb.lbc_budget_code)";
    //============================================================ common download filter

    $common = "
        FROM " . DB2 . ".budget_transaction bt
		LEFT JOIN " . DB2 . ".budget bdg ON bdg.sbg_budget_id = bt.sbg_budget_id
        LEFT JOIN " . DB2 . ".structure_budget sb ON sb.sbg_budget_id = bt.sbg_budget_id
        LEFT JOIN " . DB2 . ".purchase_order_master  pom ON pom_order_no = bgt_ref
        LEFT JOIN " . DB2 . ".purchase_order_details pod ON pom.pom_order_id = pod.pom_order_id 
		#AND pod.sbg_budget_id = bdg.sbg_budget_id  #comment by elza
		AND pod.sbg_budget_id = bt.sbg_budget_id
		AND bt.bgt_trans_amt = pod.pod_total_amt 
		LEFT JOIN " . DB2 . ".vend_customer_supplier vcs ON pom.vcs_vendor_code = vcs.vcs_vendor_code
        WHERE 
                bt.bgt_system_id = 'PO'
				AND bdg.bdg_budget_id = bt.bdg_budget_id
				AND $budgetID = ?
				AND bdg.bdg_year = ?
      ";

    //============================================================ sql download

    $sqlDownloadBdgCommitment = "
            SELECT
                    null Indexing,
                    -- bt.bgt_budget_detl_id `Budget Detail ID`, 
                    -- bt.bdg_budget_id `Budget ID`,
                    -- bt.sbg_budget_id `Structure Budget ID`, 
    		        pod.fty_fund_type `Fund Type`,
    		        pod.at_activity_code `Activity`,
    		        pod.pod_at_activity_code_budget `Activity Budget`,
    		        pod.oun_code `PTJ`,
    		        pod.ccr_costcentre `Cost Centre`, 
    		        pod.pod_ccr_costcentre_budget `Cost Centre Budget`,
                    pod.am_account_code `Account Code`,
    		        pod.bdg_budget_code `Budget Code`,
			        bt.bgt_trans_date `Trans Date`,
                    bt.bgt_ref `Reference No`, 
                    rqm_requisition_no `Requisition No`,
			        #pod.pod_total_amt `Transaction Amt`, comment by anis
					#bt.bgt_trans_amt `Transaction Amt`,

			        pom.pom_description `Description`,
                    pom.vcs_vendor_code `Pay To ID`,
				    vcs_vendor_name `Pay To Name`
                    -- bt.bgt_system_id `System ID`, 
                    -- bt.bgt_trans_type `Trans Type`,
			        -- bt.pageid `Page ID`,
			        -- bt.bgt_task_id `Task ID`,
			        -- bdg.bdg_year `Year`,
            $common
            ORDER BY bt.bdg_budget_id
        ";

    // var_dump($dataDownload); die;
    $dataDownloadBdgCommitment = executeQueryV2([
        "sql" => $sqlDownloadBdgCommitment,
        "params" => $paramBdgCommitment
    ]);

	foreach($dataDownloadBdgCommitment as &$f) {

		$f['FORMAT_CURRENCY::Transaction Amt'] = $f['bgt_trans_amt'];
		unset($f['bgt_trans_amt']);
	}

    //============================================================ for download BUDGET EXPENSES
	$param = [$_POST['id'], $_POST['year'], $_POST['id'], $_POST['year'], $_POST['id'], $_POST['year'], $_POST['id'], $_POST['year'], $_POST['id'], $_POST['year'], $_POST['id'], $_POST['year'], $_POST['id'], $_POST['year']];

	if($PROJECT_TYPE == 'uum'){
		$filter_status = "AND bid_status in ('APPROVE')";
	}
	else{
		$filter_status = "AND bid_status IN ('CHECK', 'APPROVE')";
	}

    //============================================================ common download filter
	$common = " FROM (
				SELECT DISTINCT
					bid_bills_details_id,
					bd.fty_fund_type,
					bd.at_activity_code,
					bd.at_activity_code_budget,
					bd.oun_code,
					bd.ccr_costcentre,
					bd.ccr_costcentre_budget,
					bd.acm_acct_code,
					bd.bdg_budget_code,
					bd.cpa_project_no so_code,
					bd.sbg_budget_id,
					bm.bim_bills_no,
					bm.rqm_requisition_no,
					bm.bim_bills_desc,
					bd.bid_payto_id payToId,
					bd.bid_payto_name payToName,
					(bid_amt) bid_amt,
					bid_status,
					bd.updateddate,
					'BILL' sorce
				FROM 
					".DB2.".bills_details bd
					JOIN ".DB2.".bills_master bm on bm.bim_bills_id = bd.bim_bills_id
					JOIN ".DB2.".structure_budget sb ON sb.sbg_budget_id = bd.sbg_budget_id
				WHERE 
					bid_trans_type = 'DT'
					AND CONCAT_WS('-', sb.fty_fund_type, sb.at_activity_code, sb.oun_code, sb.ccr_costcentre, sb.lbc_budget_code) = ?
					AND sb.sby_year = ?
					$filter_status
					
				UNION ALL

				SELECT DISTINCT
					bid_bills_details_id,
					bd.fty_fund_type,
					bd.at_activity_code,
					bd.at_activity_code_budget,
					bd.oun_code,
					bd.ccr_costcentre,
					bd.ccr_costcentre_budget,
					bd.acm_acct_code,
					bd.bdg_budget_code,
					bd.cpa_project_no so_code,
					bd.sbg_budget_id,
					bm.bim_bills_no,
					bm.rqm_requisition_no,
					bm.bim_bills_desc,
					bd.bid_payto_id payToId,
					bd.bid_payto_name payToName,
					(bid_amt*-1) bid_amt,
					bid_status,
					bd.updateddate,
					'BILLCANCEL' sorce
				FROM 
					".DB2.".bills_details bd
					JOIN ".DB2.".bills_master bm on bm.bim_bills_id = bd.bim_bills_id
					JOIN ".DB2.".structure_budget sb ON sb.sbg_budget_id = bd.sbg_budget_id
				WHERE 
					bid_trans_type = 'DT'
					-- AND bd.acm_acct_code IN (SELECT acm_acct_code FROM ".DB2.".account_main WHERE acm_flag_budget = 'Y')
					AND CONCAT_WS('-', sb.fty_fund_type, sb.at_activity_code, sb.oun_code, sb.ccr_costcentre, sb.lbc_budget_code) = ?
					AND sb.sby_year = ?
					AND bid_status in ('CANCEL')

				UNION ALL
				
				SELECT DISTINCT
					mjd_journal_detl_id,
					mjd.fty_fund_type,
					mjd.at_activity_code,
					mjd.at_activity_code_budget,
					mjd.oun_code,
					mjd.ccr_costcentre,
					mjd.ccr_costcentre_budget,
					mjd.acm_acct_code,
					mjd.budget_code,
					mjd.code_so,
					mjd.sbg_budget_id,
					mjm.mjm_journal_no,
					'',
					mjm.mjm_journal_desc,
					mjd.mjd_payto_id payToId,
					mjd.mjd_payto_name payToName,
					IF(mjd_trans_type = 'DT' AND mjm_status = 'APPROVE', mjd_trans_amt, mjd_trans_amt*-1) mjd_trans_amt,
					mjm_status,
					mjd.updateddate,
					'JOURNAL'
				FROM 
					".DB2.".manual_journal_details mjd
					JOIN ".DB2.".manual_journal_master mjm on mjm.mjm_journal_id = mjd.mjm_journal_no
					JOIN ".DB2.".structure_budget sb ON sb.sbg_budget_id = mjd.sbg_budget_id
				WHERE 
					CONCAT_WS('-', sb.fty_fund_type, sb.at_activity_code, sb.oun_code, sb.ccr_costcentre, sb.lbc_budget_code) = ?
					-- AND mjd.acm_acct_code IN (SELECT acm_acct_code FROM ".DB2.".account_main WHERE acm_flag_budget = 'Y')
					AND sb.sby_year = ?
					AND mjm.mjm_system_id IN ('MNL')
					AND mjm_status in ('APPROVE', 'CANCEL')
					
				UNION ALL
				
				SELECT DISTINCT
					mjd_journal_detl_id,
					mjd.fty_fund_type,
					mjd.at_activity_code,
					mjd.at_activity_code,
					mjd.oun_code,
					mjd.ccr_costcentre,
					mjd.ccr_costcentre,
					mjd.acm_acct_code,
					mjd.acm_acct_code,
					mjd.code_so,
					mjd.sbg_budget_id,
					mjm.mjm_journal_no,
					'',
					mjm.mjm_journal_desc,
					mjd.mjd_payto_id payToId,
					mjd.mjd_payto_name payToName,
					IF(mjd_trans_type = 'DT' AND mjm_status = 'APPROVE', mjd_trans_amt, mjd_trans_amt*-1) mjd_trans_amt,
					mjm_status,
					mjd.updateddate,
					'JOURNAL_SELAIN_MNL'
				FROM 
					".DB2.".manual_journal_details mjd
					JOIN ".DB2.".manual_journal_master mjm on mjm.mjm_journal_id = mjd.mjm_journal_no
					-- JOIN ".DB2.".budget_transaction bgt ON bgt.bgt_ref = mjm.mjm_journal_no AND IF(mjd_trans_type = 'DT', mjd_trans_amt, mjd_trans_amt*-1) = bgt_trans_amt 
					JOIN ".DB2.".structure_budget sb ON sb.sbg_budget_id = mjd.sbg_budget_id
				WHERE 
					CONCAT_WS('-', sb.fty_fund_type, sb.at_activity_code, sb.oun_code, sb.ccr_costcentre, sb.lbc_budget_code) = ?
					-- AND mjd.acm_acct_code IN (SELECT acm_acct_code FROM ".DB2.".account_main WHERE acm_flag_budget = 'Y')
					AND sb.sby_year = ?
					AND mjm.mjm_system_id NOT IN ('MNL')
					AND mjm_status in ('APPROVE', 'CANCEL')
				#DT	
				UNION ALL		
				SELECT DISTINCT
					pde_posting_detl_id,
					-- pod_order_detl_id,
					pd.fty_fund_type,
					pd.at_activity_code,
					pd.at_activity_code,
					pd.oun_code,
					pd.ccr_costcentre,
					pd.ccr_costcentre,
					pd.acm_acct_code,
					pd.acm_acct_code,
					'' so_code,
					bgt.sbg_budget_id,
					pd.pde_document_no,
					'',
					pd.pde_doc_description,
					pd.pde_payto_id payToId,
					pd.pde_payto_name payToName,
					pde_trans_amt mjd_trans_amt,
					'nehi' status,
					pd.updateddate,
					'RECEIPT'
				FROM 
					-- ".DB2.".receipt_details rcd
					--  JOIN ".DB2.".receipt_master rcm on rcm.rma_receipt_master_id = rcd.rma_receipt_master_id
					".DB2.".posting_details pd
					-- JOIN ".DB2.".budget_transaction bgt oN bgt.bgt_ref = pd.pde_document_no AND IF(pde_trans_type = 'CR', pde_trans_amt, pde_trans_amt*-1) = bgt_trans_amt (komen sbb isuu x sama amount)
					JOIN ".DB2.".budget_transaction bgt oN bgt.bgt_ref = pd.pde_document_no AND pde_trans_amt = bgt_trans_amt 
					JOIN ".DB2.".structure_budget sb ON sb.sbg_budget_id = bgt.sbg_budget_id
					JOIN ".DB2.".activity_type act on act.at_activity_code = pd.at_activity_code 
				WHERE 
					bgt_system_id IN ('RECEIPT')
					AND CONCAT_WS('-', sb.fty_fund_type, sb.at_activity_code, sb.oun_code, sb.ccr_costcentre, sb.lbc_budget_code) = ?
					AND sb.sby_year = ?
					AND pde_trans_type = 'DT'
					AND pd.acm_acct_code IN  (SELECT acm_acct_code FROM ".DB2.".account_main WHERE acm_flag_budget = 'Y')
				#CR
				UNION ALL		
				SELECT DISTINCT
					pde_posting_detl_id,
					-- pod_order_detl_id,
					pd.fty_fund_type,
					pd.at_activity_code,
					pd.at_activity_code,
					pd.oun_code,
					pd.ccr_costcentre,
					pd.ccr_costcentre,
					pd.acm_acct_code,
					pd.acm_acct_code,
					'' so_code,
					bgt.sbg_budget_id,
					pd.pde_document_no,
					'',
					pd.pde_doc_description,
					pd.pde_payto_id payToId,
					pd.pde_payto_name payToName,
					(pde_trans_amt*-1) mjd_trans_amt,
					'nehi' status,
					pd.updateddate,
					'RECEIPT'
				FROM 
					-- ".DB2.".receipt_details rcd
					--  JOIN ".DB2.".receipt_master rcm on rcm.rma_receipt_master_id = rcd.rma_receipt_master_id
					".DB2.".posting_details pd

	}
	if ($_POST['sm_filter']['sm_budgetcode']) {
		$filter .= " AND SB.lbc_budget_code LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%')";

	if ($_POST['search']['value']) {
		$filter .= " AND CONCAT_WS('__',

					bdg_bal_carryforward,
					bdg_lock_amt,

	$commonDownload = " FROM
						" . DB2 . ".budget B,

						LEFT JOIN " . DB2 . ".fund_type AS FT
							ON SB.fty_fund_type = FT.fty_fund_type
						LEFT JOIN " . DB2 . ".activity_type AS ATS 
							ON SB.at_activity_code = ATS.at_activity_code
						LEFT JOIN " . DB2 . ".organization_unit AS OU
							ON SB.oun_code = OU.oun_code
						LEFT JOIN " . DB2 . ".account_main AS AM
							ON SB.lbc_budget_code = AM.acm_acct_code
						LEFT JOIN fims_usr.costcentre CC
							ON SB.ccr_costcentre = CC.ccr_costcentre
						WHERE
							B.sbg_budget_id = SB.sbg_budget_id
							AND B.bdg_year = SB.sby_year
							AND B.bdg_status ='APPROVED'     
							$filterDownload
							$filter
	";

	if($_GET['download'] == 'CSV') {

		//============================================================ sql download
		$sqlDownload = "SELECT
							$concat `Structure Budget`,
							bdg_status `Status`,
							bdg_year `Year`,
							FORMAT(IFNULL(bdg_bal_carryforward,0),2) `Opening`,
							IFNULL(B.bdg_initial_amt,0) `Initial`,
							sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_additional_amt,0)) `Increment/Decrement`, 
							sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_virement_amt,0)) `Virement`,

							sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_request_amt,0)) `Request`,
							sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_commit_amt,0)) `Commit`,
							sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_expenses_amt,0)) `Expenses`,
							sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_balance_amt,0)) `Balance`
						$commonDownload
						GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
						ORDER BY {$_POST['sort']['column']} {$_POST['sort']['dir']}
		";

		$recordsFiltered = executeQueryV2($sql_countRecords, $param)[0]['C'];

		$dataDownload = executeQueryV2([

		}

			$grandTotalVirement += $d['Virement'];
			$grandTotalAllocated += $d['Allocated'];
			$grandTotalLock += $d['Lock'];
			$grandTotalRequest += $d['Request'];
			$grandTotalCommit += $d['Commit'];
			$grandTotalExpenses += $d['Expenses'];
			$grandTotalBalance += $d['Balance'];
			$d['Opening'] = number_format($d['Opening'], 2);
			$d['Initial'] = number_format($d['Initial'], 2);
			$d['Increment/Decrement'] = number_format($d['Increment/Decrement'], 2);
			$d['Virement'] = number_format($d['Virement'], 2);
			$d['Allocated'] = number_format($d['Allocated'], 2);
			$d['Lock'] = number_format($d['Lock'], 2);
			$d['Request'] = number_format($d['Request'], 2);
			$d['Commit'] = number_format($d['Commit'], 2);

			],

			"content" => $dataDownload,
			"footer" => [[
				NULL, NULL, NULL, 'TOTAL',
				number_format($grandTotalOpening, 2),
				number_format($grandTotalinitial, 2),
				number_format($grandTotalAdditional, 2),
				number_format($grandTotalVirement, 2),
				number_format($grandTotalAllocated, 2),
				number_format($grandTotalLock, 2),
				number_format($grandTotalRequest, 2),
				number_format($grandTotalCommit, 2),
				number_format($grandTotalExpenses, 2),
				number_format($grandTotalBalance, 2),
			]]
		]);
	}
	elseif($_GET['download'] == 'PDF'){

		$column = $_POST['sort']['column']+1;

		/*$sql = "SELECT
					1 `FORMAT_CENTER::Indexing`,
					$concat `Structure Budget`,
					#bdg_status `FORMAT_CENTER::Status`,
					#bdg_year `FORMAT_CENTER::Year`,
					FORMAT(IFNULL(bdg_bal_carryforward,0),2) `FORMAT_RIGHT::Opening`,
					FORMAT(IFNULL(B.bdg_initial_amt,0),2) `FORMAT_RIGHT::Initial`,
					FORMAT(sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_additional_amt,0)),2) `FORMAT_RIGHT::Inc/Dec`, 
					FORMAT(sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_virement_amt,0)),2) `FORMAT_RIGHT::Virement`,
					FORMAT(sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_allocated_amt,0)),2) `FORMAT_RIGHT::Allocated`,
					FORMAT(sum(IFNULL(bdg_lock_amt,0)),2) `FORMAT_RIGHT::Lock`,
					FORMAT(sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_request_amt,0)),2) `FORMAT_RIGHT::Request`,
					FORMAT(sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_commit_amt,0)),2) `FORMAT_RIGHT::Commit`,
					FORMAT(sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_expenses_amt,0)),2) `FORMAT_RIGHT::Expenses`,
					FORMAT(sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_balance_amt,0)),2) `FORMAT_RIGHT::Balance`
				$commonDownload
				GROUP BY 2, 3, 4
				ORDER BY {$column} {$_POST['sort']['dir']}
		";*/

		$data = executeQueryV2(
				"SELECT
					$concat structure_budget,
					IFNULL(bdg_bal_carryforward,0) Opening,
					IFNULL(B.bdg_initial_amt,0) Initial,
					sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_additional_amt,0)) bdg_additional_amt, 
					sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_virement_amt,0)) Virement,
					sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_allocated_amt,0)) Allocated,
					sum(IFNULL(bdg_lock_amt,0)) bdg_lock_amt,

					sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_commit_amt,0)) Commit,
					sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_expenses_amt,0)) Expenses,
					sum(IFNULL(B.bdg_balance_amt,0)) Balance
				$commonDownload
				GROUP BY 1,2,3
				ORDER BY {$column} {$_POST['sort']['dir']}
		", $param);

		$columnLabel = [

			["structure_budget", "Structure Budget"],
			["Opening", "GRAND_TOTAL::FORMAT_CURRENCY::Opening (RM)"],
			["Initial", "GRAND_TOTAL::FORMAT_CURRENCY::Initial (RM)"],

			["Expenses", "GRAND_TOTAL::FORMAT_CURRENCY::Expenses (RM)"],
			["Balance", "GRAND_TOTAL::FORMAT_CURRENCY::Balance (RM)"]
		];

		/*generatePDF([

			"orientation" => 'landscape',

		generateReport([

		'orientation' => 'L',
